message: My cost is 93. I need to ask above this to profit. Please bid high enough for us to trade.
My valuation is quite low, around 55. If your cost is really 93, there's no overlap for us to trade. I can only bid in the 50s range. Let's see if we can find common ground.
Still constrained around 55-60 max. With your stated cost of 93, I don't see overlap. If your real cost is lower, maybe we can find a deal. I can stretch slightly but not much beyond 60.
Cost is truly 93. No overlap with your ~60. No trade.
